articles.title: Lachine mother and son 2025 drowning deaths ruled accidental: coroner
articles.description: A Quebec coroner says the 2025 drowning deaths of a 34-year-old mother and her three-year-old son in a residential pool in Montreal’s Lachine borough were accidental, as neither knew how to swim. It happened on June 10, 2025, at a home on 20 Avenue near Provost Street.&#160
